forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Patchy morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of morning fog. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of morning fog. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the east, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Cloudy. Patchy morning fog on and east of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the early morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 12 and 18.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, most likely late this afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 19.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the far west late this afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Coober Pedy in the afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Coober Pedy. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly and light becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Mostly sunny. Patchy morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 22.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning north to northeasterly during the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 24.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Leigh Creek in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 24.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 24.
